display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: A new crew are under threat from crocodiles and accusations of illegal prospecting. The Victoria Diggers receive some welcome help.

programme.title: Extinct Or Alive
programme.desc: On one of his most audacious and exciting expeditions to date, Forrest travels to the remote Galapagos Islands in search of the fabled Fernandina tortoise.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Tempers flare on the Northwestern and the future looks uncertain for the Seabrooke as the fleet prepares to begin their winter hunt for Opilio crab.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: As unrelenting winds rip across the crab grounds, the Wizard prepares to do battle with the descending polar ice pack. Meanwhile, tempers flare on board the Kodiak.

programme.title: Devil's Canyon
programme.desc: It's the final push before winter hits and season goals slip away. Pump problems for Boyce put his gold haul at risk, and Ben banks on his skills to survive.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh has a fresh lead on a shipwreck from 1715 with a potentially massive treasure haul. He launches an expedition into Florida's Atlantic coast.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Josh Gates embarks on yet another mission, this time into the dark caves and thick jungles of Puerto Rico in search of the mysterious Chupacabra.

programme.title: Alaska: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: Home Is Where The Yurt Is. In the Tennessee mountains, the Raneys construct a massive yurt. They turn a rundown pond into a food source and create a workshop with a propane forge.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Cloudy With A Chance Of Explosives. Slim Pickings' efforts to recycle precious dam water are derailed. The Blacklighters scrounge for any last opal in their Land of Promise Claim.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Sam smashes opal with a jackhammer in the Bushmen's mine. Plus, Rod and Les make a wager that will force the loser to wear one of Sam's pink shirts.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sig heads off the grid on a daring midnight mission, hoping to shake his rivals. Plus, Keith receives big news from his doctor regarding a mystery illness.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Keith struggles to keep the Wizard afloat as a flooding collision void threatens to sink him. Plus, Jake is left stranded when a boat part goes missing.

programme.title: Cops UK: Bodycam Squad
programme.desc: An officer is spat on as he tries to arrest an angry fugitive, and a rookie cop hits the jackpot in a raid of a suspected criminal's home.

programme.title: Street Cops UK
programme.desc: Rob tries to trace the source of a dangerous new batch of drugs that's been causing a spate of overdoses in Medway. Dan chases down an aggressive drunk driver.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Poseidon Crew's mine site is swamped after a brutal storm. Ryan collapses in a deadly heatwave, while Russell and Shane uncover a big nugget.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: An independent mother of three, plus a jungle savvy Green Beret, take on the remote wetlands of Guyana. But will they be up to the task.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: A nurturing mother, and an independent adventurer try to survive in the rainforests of Nicaragua. Can they conquer two weeks Naked and Afraid.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: The team visits a favourite local restaurant to salvage signage. Plus, they learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs
programme.desc: Agatha's Catholic Church. The crew travels to Ellwood City to reclaim pieces of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. In the bitter cold, they salvage stained glass and spiral ducting.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Co-captains Jake and Johnathan try to join forces with rival Keith Colburn. Junior risks crossing into enemy waters and Wild Bill seeks work in Russia.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: The Coast Guard responds to a Mayday call, as captains and crew brace a brutal winter storm. Sig and Monte track an Opilio hoard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: As the crab biomass migrates across the Russian line, Josh and Casey dump 175 pots on the border. Meanwhile, Jake's new deckhand suffers an injury.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Sweltering temperatures and a waterlogged mine threaten to unravel The Digi Diggers' season-long dream. The Cheals' starter motor fails on their wash plant.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Bushmen put their lives on the line in the most dangerous mine they have ever worked. Plus, the Cheal's first dig of the season grinds to a halt.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Between A Rod And A Hard Place. A rookie miner gets trapped down a mine shaft. A dust storm forces the Blacklights to reluctantly return to the failed Land of Promise money pit.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: Huge floods and a mini tornado hit the Gemfields. Max fights his way to his mining lease, but did the flooding fill or destroy his dam? Todd and Brianna get bad news.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the mining season. Water in the dam means one last chance for sapphires for Max and Glenn. It's terror in the tunnels for Todd and Brianna.

programme.title: Gem Hunters Down Under
programme.desc: Old Timer, Ray, and his best mate Paul set foot on a new claim for the first time. The Apprentices begin connecting two mine shafts via an underground drive.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: After a frustrating day, the Ferals hit a gold hot streak. An injury rocks the Gold Timers, while Shane and Russell struggle with their homemade sluice.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: Prospectors Jacqui and Andrew uncover gold in Queensland. The Poseidon Crew get some exciting news, while the Dust Devils spend big on new equipment.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
programme.desc: The Gold Timers fight back against gold thieves. Machinery problems continue to plague the Dust Devils, while Marcus is panicked when Linden goes missing.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: Meet Extreme Cheapskate and dumpster diver Kate who takes us through her super cheap lifestyle in New York City.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: When penny-pincher Terence is asked to attend a special family dinner, he puts everyone on a strict budget. Plus, Greg puts his cheap skills to the test on a first date.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: Victoria refuses to shower at home and lives well under her means. When boyfriend Steve moves in, how will he handle her frugal ways and meals foraged from the wild.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates
programme.desc: Abdul is the ultimate cheapskate, even haggling the price of an anniversary cake. Vicki refuses to buy a TV or clothes for her kids, and uses road kill for gifts.

programme.title: Paranormal Caught On Camera
programme.desc: A witch taunts investigators in a graveyard, a woman's late husband checks in on their baby, and an erupting volcano spews paranormal activity.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey visit a museum in Florida. Reports of multiple attacks on volunteers have sparked the need for a paranormal investigation.

programme.title: Kindred Spirits
programme.desc: Amy Bruni, Adam Berry and Chip Coffey investigate a jail in Florida. Rumours suggest murderous spirits are lurking in this property.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Amazing stories of people who have experienced God's blessings.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Eric's desire to act lands him a role on a television show; Shawn questions whether he should remain friends with Topanga.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Topanga, who is still upset that Cory kissed another girl, dates someone else.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: After a reconciliation, Cory and Topanga pretend to be apart so Shawn can think he's the only one who can bring them back together.

programme.title: Boy Meets World
programme.desc: Cory and Topanga end up at the same hotel as Alan and Amy on prom night.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: 700 Club Interactive
programme.desc: Highlighting current events and stories that will help bring encouragment to people.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Dana, Cheryl's sister and best friend, moves away, Jim realizes he must find Cheryl a new friend as soon as possible.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim's band wins a contest, providing the group an opportunity to play backup for child pop sensation Jami McFame.

programme.title: Dr. Dolittle
programme.desc: After a fender bender, Dr. John Dolittle (Eddie Murphy) gets back his childhood ability to converse with animals. But the gift turns out to be a mixed blessing when the good doctor finds himself besieged by boozing monkeys, injured owls and depressed lions who need his special assistance. When Dolittle's strange behavior catches the attention of his wife, Lisa (Kristen Wilson), he winds up in a me

programme.title: Dr. Dolittle 2
programme.desc: In Dr. Dolittle 2, the now-famous doc has more patients -- two-legged and four-legged -- than he can handle. But his animal friends want more than office visits. The outraged critters want to save their forest from unscrupulous human developers, and they're seeking Dolittle's help.

programme.title: The Pacifier
programme.desc: Elite Navy SEAL Shane Wolfe (Vin Diesel) can handle just about anything thrown his way, but even the best have their limits. When he fails to keep scientist Howard Plummer (Tate Donovan) safe from assassination, Wolfe has a shot at redemption by being assigned to protect Plummer's five children, including rebellious Zoe (Brittany Snow), Seth (Max Thieriot) and clingy Lulu (Morgan York). More than

programme.title: The Game Plan
programme.desc: Bachelor football star Joe Kingman (Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson) seems to have it all. He is wealthy and carefree, and his team is on the way to capturing a championship. Suddenly, he is tackled by some unexpected news: He has a young daughter (Madison Pettis), the result of a last fling with his ex-wife. Joe must learn to balance his personal and professional lives with the needs of his child.

programme.title: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: An unemployed actor disguises himself as an elderly nanny in order to spend more time with his estranged family.

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl and Dana are forced to smash their way out of a locked garage because they ignored Jim's lesson on how to open the door from the inside.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim is concerned that Kyle is going to grow up to be effeminate when he insists on wearing a Cinderella costume for Halloween.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim is hurt when Ruby invites Andy to the father-daughter dance instead of him.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl's mother has plans for the afterlife that would put everyone in a large family plot she reserved years ago, but Jim insists on his own family plot, conveniently located next to that of a star football player.

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle Is Here... & It is a Once-In-A-Lifetime Coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: Meet ordinary people who have experienced the extraordinary power of prayer.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: America 250th Anniversary Coins: Enduring Liberty Half Dollars
programme.desc: Join Mike Mezack for a special presentation of the 1776-2026 Enduring Liberty Half Dollars-one-year-only U.S. Mint issues honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including rare rolls and certified MS67 collectibles.

programme.title: Nuwave Forever, Air Purifier With Never Replace Filters
programme.desc: B. Johnson shares the Nuwave Forever Air Purifier with NeverReplace Filters; get the smart Wi-Fi-enabled air purifier that helps achieve zero airborne pollutants without any additional replacement filters.

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Ron's Gone Wrong
programme.desc: Barney is a socially awkward schoolboy who receives a robot named Ron -- a walking, talking, digitally connected device that's supposed to be his best friend. Barney is excited to finally have his own robot -- until his new toy starts to hilariously malfunction, drawing the attention of a shady executive who wants to protect his company's stock price at all costs.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Chihuahua
programme.desc: Chloe, a pampered Chihuahua from Beverly Hills, gets an unwelcome taste of the real world when she gets lost in a tough part of Mexico. With no Rodeo Drive boutiques in sight, she is out of her element, until scrappy street dogs Delgado and Papi lend her a paw, helping her find her way home.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Chihuahua 2
programme.desc: Papi and Chloe's lives turn upside down when they have a litter of puppies.

programme.title: Willy Wonka and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: The last of five coveted "golden tickets" falls into the hands of a sweet but very poor boy. He and his grandpa then get a tour of the strangest chocolate factory in the world. The owner leads five young winners on a thrilling and often dangerous tour of his factory.

programme.title: Mulan
programme.desc: Fearful that her ailing father will be drafted into the Chinese military, Mulan takes his spot -- though, as a girl living under a patriarchal regime, she is technically unqualified to serve. She cleverly impersonates a man and goes off to train with fellow recruits. Accompanied by her dragon, Mushu, she uses her smarts to help ward off a Hun invasion, falling in love with a dashing captain along

programme.title: The Little Mermaid
programme.desc: In Disney's beguiling animated romp, rebellious 16-year-old mermaid Ariel (Jodi Benson) is fascinated with life on land. On one of her visits to the surface, which are forbidden by her controlling father, King Triton, she falls for a human prince. Determined to be with her new love, Ariel makes a dangerous deal with the sea witch Ursula (Pat Carroll) to become human for three days. But when plans

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast
programme.desc: An arrogant young prince and his castle's servants fall under the spell of a wicked enchantress, who turns him into the hideous Beast until he learns to love and be loved in return. The spirited, headstrong village girl Belle enters the Beast's castle after he imprisons her father Maurice. With the help of his enchanted servants, including the matronly Mrs. Potts, Belle begins to draw the cold-hea

programme.title: Bob Dylan: Leader of the Free World
programme.desc: Explore Bob Dylan's transformative journey through music, from folk poet to cultural icon and his impact on generations; learning the timeless legacy of his lyrics, voice and ever-evolving artistry.

programme.title: Elvis: Death of the King
programme.desc: Elvis Presley's charisma and musical talent made him the king of rock, but his rock star lifestyle led to a downfall that was as swift as his rise.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Laura offers to walk a man's dog and uses the opportunity to snoop through his house; Jordan goes out with a love interest but he blacks out from heavy drinking, leaving him to put the pieces back together of what happened the night before.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Glenn strikes gold when a gorgeous man asks him on a gym date, but it deteriorates quickly as the man has serious rage issues; Hannah is charmed by a classmate's powerful performance; Jesse agrees to meet a guy from a dating app that is into kink.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Singer Ally Brooke returns home to San Antonio, where recipes come from the heart, not a measuring cup; Ally and her family talk about her tour, her album and the comforts of home.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Rapper Dave East and his parents share their favorite meal of steak and eggs; Dave talks about his father's positive influence, the importance of a strong work ethic and his role as Method Man in "Wu Tang: An American Saga.".

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia teams with an Internet sensation.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Mr. Ghetto is arrested, jeopardizing the tour.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia dances on cars for her newest video, risking arrest.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia teams up with other bounce musicians for a children's song.

programme.title: Big Freedia: Queen of Bounce
programme.desc: Big Freedia makes a bounce act for kids.

programme.title: Ruta madre
programme.desc: After he gets his heart broken, a Mexican-American singer embarks on a road trip through Mexico to reconnect with his roots.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: A spoiled rich girl is sent to work for her family's toy business in China after she is cut off by her father for blowing through most of her trust fund.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: ASAP Ferg and his uncle T-Nice share a secret apple pie recipe, talk about his new album, and their biggest life lessons.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: Saweetie, her Aunt and Grandma make gumbo, and reveal intimate family history including the origin of her name, Saweetie. Then DaniLeigh and her little sister Brianna make their family tradition, ᰠDominican Lasagnaᴠ and a tasty drink, Morir Sonando.

programme.title: Made From Scratch
programme.desc: G-Eazy and his mom make homemade waffles and discuss G-Eazy's Endless Summer Fund and his dream of buying her a house.

programme.title: The Beatles: In the Life
programme.desc: The Beatles took the world by storm in the 1960s and are still the best-selling band of all time with 183 million sales worldwide.

programme.title: Killing John Lennon
programme.desc: A dramatic step-by-step breakdown behind the lead up to John Lennon's murder on Dec. 8, 1980.

programme.title: The Ride Life
programme.desc: Sung explores the UK car culture, finding it's the people who make it truly unforgettable.

programme.title: The Ride Life With Sung Kang
programme.desc: Sung dives into Poland's car culture, discovering new freedoms in a thrilling experience.

programme.title: The Last 24 Hours: Elvis Presley
programme.desc: Elvis Presley's Memphis Mafia recounts the true story of his last 24 hours and death.

programme.title: Elvis & the Memphis Mafia
programme.desc: Exploring Elvis' life through the eyes of The Memphis Mafia- a select group of friends he entrusted with his life- from the highs to the lows.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: Shook Up
programme.desc: Behind the glitz and glamour of rock 'n' roll royalty is the haunting tale of Elvis Presley; many question his moral fiber and notorious violent temper; devilish charm dressed in angelic white had friends and fans fooled for too long.

programme.title: Elvis & Priscilla: Conditional Love
programme.desc: Experts peel back the layers of Priscilla and the Rock 'n' Roll King's controversial love story to cast light on the dysfunction under the dreamy and glamorous surface.

programme.title: Jim Morrison's Final Chapter
programme.desc: Explore the life of Jim Morrison, the Doors frontman, and uncover the enigmatic details surrounding his untimely death in Paris at age 27.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: A spoiled rich girl is sent to work for her family's toy business in China after she is cut off by her father for blowing through most of her trust fund.

programme.title: Blondie: Glass Heart
programme.desc: The story of Blondie and their rise from small clubs in New York City to selling out shows around the globe.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Gabe plans a picturesque date on a sailboat, but it quickly goes awry; while working her first job at a carnival, Amy gets asked out by a corny manager; fresh out of being un-engaged, Victoria's date goes from romantic to creepy very quickly.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Excited to go on a date with her crush, Carlita is surprised to end up at his mother's house instead; "RuPaul's Drag Race" contestant Vanessa Vanjie Mateo goes on a date in Texas and when her date starts ignoring her, all hell starts breaking loose.

programme.title: Discontinued
programme.desc: Discontinued uncovers the rise, fall, and eventual discontinuation of various items from the past. We follow four diverse topics: the toy craze of the Furby to the enduring technology of the Blackberry, and the memorable 90s Nickelodeon TV hit Legends of the Hidden Temple to the short-lived Galactic Starcruiser experience at Disney World. The Discontinued Documentarians, Nostalgia Aficionados, and

programme.title: Discontinued
programme.desc: Discontinued uncovers the rise and fall of things from the past. The episode focuses on four diverse topics: Blockbuster, Talkboy, the Lotus Esprit and MacGyver.

programme.title: Bollywed
programme.desc: Old ways and new ways are challenged as the kids try to take mom and dad's bridal business to the next level.

programme.title: Bollywed
programme.desc: Social media versus face-to-face gets put to the test; Kuki and Chandan compete over whose sales techniques work best.

programme.title: Bollywed
programme.desc: The family venture out on a weekend pop-up sale in the suburban area.

programme.title: Bollywed
programme.desc: Major store repairs put Chandan's dream of a second location in jeopardy when Mom and Dad decide repairs come first.

programme.title: Malibooty
programme.desc: Three buddies (Brian Hooks, Sticky Fingaz, J.T. Jackson) leave their Arizona town and head to California for a wild beach party.

programme.title: Better Criminal
programme.desc: A detective in the LAPD is forced to work for two warring crime syndicates while under an internal investigation.

programme.title: Shoot the Hero
programme.desc: An engaged couple accidentally thwart a jewelry heist and become the target of hit men.

programme.title: Elvis & the Memphis Mafia
programme.desc: Exploring Elvis' life through the eyes of The Memphis Mafia- a select group of friends he entrusted with his life- from the highs to the lows.

programme.title: Elvis Presley: Shook Up
programme.desc: Behind the glitz and glamour of rock 'n' roll royalty is the haunting tale of Elvis Presley; many question his moral fiber and notorious violent temper; devilish charm dressed in angelic white had friends and fans fooled for too long.

programme.title: Elvis & Priscilla: Conditional Love
programme.desc: Experts peel back the layers of Priscilla and the Rock 'n' Roll King's controversial love story to cast light on the dysfunction under the dreamy and glamorous surface.

programme.title: Hollywood: No Sex, Please
programme.desc: Exploring how Hollywood has evolved to reflect society's changing attitudes towards sex over the decades, from "Basic Instinct" and "Body Heat" to "Mad Men" and "Sex and the City.".

programme.title: Malibooty
programme.desc: Three buddies (Brian Hooks, Sticky Fingaz, J.T. Jackson) leave their Arizona town and head to California for a wild beach party.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Upon discovering that their self-made Lethal Weapon sequels have been pulled from the local library, the Gang decides to address their political incorrectness by making another film: Lethal Weapon 7.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Charlie and Rex find themselves at the mercy of a dangerous crime kingpin from their past when they enlist his help on a case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: When Sarah ́s former professor is allegedly framed for murder, Sarah calls Charlie and Rex to untangle the perfect crime.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with only one thing in common -- the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: On the third anniversary of Charlie and Rex's partnership, Charlie recounts how a high-stakes kidnapping brought the duo together on their first case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: While on the hunt for an escaped murderer, Charlie and Rex are held hostage; when a greater threat emerges, Charlie and his captor are forced to work together if they're going to make it out alive.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A mummified body is discovered in Newfoundland ́s tundra; Charlie and Rex set off in search of a community of survivalists who may be harboring a murderer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with only one thing in common -- the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: On the third anniversary of Charlie and Rex's partnership, Charlie recounts how a high-stakes kidnapping brought the duo together on their first case.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: While on the hunt for an escaped murderer, Charlie and Rex are held hostage; when a greater threat emerges, Charlie and his captor are forced to work together if they're going to make it out alive.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A mummified body is discovered in Newfoundland ́s tundra; Charlie and Rex set off in search of a community of survivalists who may be harboring a murderer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: After a woman is found dead in the snow, Charlie and Rex have a pool of unconnected suspects with only one thing in common -- the victim was convinced they were all her family.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: On the third anniversary of Charlie and Rex's partnership, Charlie recounts how a high-stakes kidnapping brought the duo together on their first case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a businessman is murdered, his surprising connection to Cosgrove's daughter helps the police make a break in the case; Price and Maroun disagree on how to proceed at trial when the defendant's age brings up legal precedent they must follow.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A couple's dinner party ends with a violent home invasion and assault by masked men; Rollins suspects the crime is linked to her Intelligence investigation of an international gang of thieves.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a businessman is murdered, his surprising connection to Cosgrove's daughter helps the police make a break in the case; Price and Maroun disagree on how to proceed at trial when the defendant's age brings up legal precedent they must follow.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A couple's dinner party ends with a violent home invasion and assault by masked men; Rollins suspects the crime is linked to her Intelligence investigation of an international gang of thieves.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Cosgrove and Shaw suspect an art dealer was murdered but can't make an arrest until they locate her body; Price and Maroun must go to trial with a circumstantial case and a suspect with unlimited resources; the squad celebrates a birthday.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Agent Clay consults with Benson when a woman is found gravely injured at a remote campground and the suspect could be anywhere along the Eastern Seaboard; Bruno and Silva take a chance on an odd hunch to see if it becomes a lead.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as detectives and prosecutors pursue justice in New York City. In cases ripped from the headlines, police investigate serious and often deadly crimes, weighing the evidence and questioning the suspects until someone is taken into custody. The district attorney's office then builds a case to convict the perpetrator by proving them guilty beyond a reasonable doubt. Working

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: This groundbreaking series from executive producer Dick Wolf's "Law & Order" franchise chronicles the ripped-from-the-headlines investigations of the NYPD's Special Victims Unit; led by courageous and compassionate Capt. Olivia Benson, this elite team includes Sgt. Odafin Tutuola, Detective Amanda Rollins, Officer Katriona Tamin and Deputy Chief Christian Garland, who focus on finding justice for

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as detectives and prosecutors pursue justice in New York City. In cases ripped from the headlines, police investigate serious and often deadly crimes, weighing the evidence and questioning the suspects until someone is taken into custody. The district attorney's office then builds a case to convict the perpetrator by proving them guilty beyond a reasonable doubt. Working

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: This groundbreaking series from executive producer Dick Wolf's "Law & Order" franchise chronicles the ripped-from-the-headlines investigations of the NYPD's Special Victims Unit; led by courageous and compassionate Capt. Olivia Benson, this elite team includes Sgt. Odafin Tutuola, Detective Amanda Rollins, Officer Katriona Tamin and Deputy Chief Christian Garland, who focus on finding justice for

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Frank, Dennis and Dee suspect Mac is the serial killer they read about; they devise a plan to catch him in the act.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Dennis' mistaken identity bothers him for the wrong reasons; Mac tries to bond with his ex-convict father, who bothers Dee.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Frank, Dennis and Dee suspect Mac is the serial killer they read about; they devise a plan to catch him in the act.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: Dennis' mistaken identity bothers him for the wrong reasons; Mac tries to bond with his ex-convict father, who bothers Dee.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: While on the hunt for an escaped murderer, Charlie and Rex are held hostage; when a greater threat emerges, Charlie and his captor are forced to work together if they're going to make it out alive.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A mummified body is discovered in Newfoundland ́s tundra; Charlie and Rex set off in search of a community of survivalists who may be harboring a murderer.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A scuba diver washes ashore with his oxygen supply severed; Charlie dives into the Atlantic Ocean to uncover the secret he was killed to protect.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The near poisoning of a wealthy socialite throws the team into a perilous investigation that puts Charlie, Rex, and even Jesse in harms way.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A young woman is abducted from the very spot her friend was murdered two years earlier; Charlie and Rex race against time as they trail the suspects from the original investigation.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex is on trial after his DNA is discovered at the scene of the murder of Donovan's former police informant.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A scuba diver washes ashore with his oxygen supply severed; Charlie dives into the Atlantic Ocean to uncover the secret he was killed to protect.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: The near poisoning of a wealthy socialite throws the team into a perilous investigation that puts Charlie, Rex, and even Jesse in harms way.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: In 2015, a young pastor named Carl Lentz lands in New York City to spread the Word of Hillsong, an Australian megachurch; after allegations explode, Lentz is fired from his role and disappears; now he breaks his silence after more than two years.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: In their first interviews since their expulsion, Carl and Laura Lentz shed light onto the inner sanctum of Hillsong, detailing the burden of building the church's congregation and the response from leadership when it deemed Carl a liability.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: A group of international reporters discover Hillsong's founding father, Frank Houston, laid the groundwork for the church's pattern of covering up misconduct with non-disclosure agreements and hush money.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: Shortly after Carl Lentz's expulsion from Hillsong, Brian Houston is formally charged with concealing his father's crimes and banished from Hillsong after allegations of his own misconduct are made public.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: In 2015, a young pastor named Carl Lentz lands in New York City to spread the Word of Hillsong, an Australian megachurch; after allegations explode, Lentz is fired from his role and disappears; now he breaks his silence after more than two years.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: In their first interviews since their expulsion, Carl and Laura Lentz shed light onto the inner sanctum of Hillsong, detailing the burden of building the church's congregation and the response from leadership when it deemed Carl a liability.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: A group of international reporters discover Hillsong's founding father, Frank Houston, laid the groundwork for the church's pattern of covering up misconduct with non-disclosure agreements and hush money.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hillsong
programme.desc: Shortly after Carl Lentz's expulsion from Hillsong, Brian Houston is formally charged with concealing his father's crimes and banished from Hillsong after allegations of his own misconduct are made public.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage. Join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: The Darkest Minds
programme.desc: When teens mysteriously develop powerful new abilities, they are declared a threat by the government and detained. One of the most powerful young people, Ruby, escapes from her camp and joins a group of runaways who are seeking a safe haven. Betrayed by the adults in power, this newfound family soon realizes that running is not enough -- they must use their collective powers to wage a resistance a

programme.title: Deep Rising
programme.desc: A newly unveiled ocean liner, the Argonautica sets out on its first cruise, only to encounter dangers both on board and in the ocean depths. While the beautiful thief Trillian attempts to steal riches from the boat's wealthy passengers, the ship encounters major problems, most notably a giant murderous sea creature with tentacles. Eventually, a boat captained by John Finnegan comes across the Argo

programme.title: The Day the Earth Stood Still
programme.desc: Klaatu, an extraterrestrial visitor to planet Earth, becomes the herald of upheaval on a global scale. As the world's governments and scientists race to understand what is happening and how to stop it, Dr. Helen Benson and her stepson come to understand the chilling ramifications behind Klaatu's statement that he is a "friend to the Earth.".

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk
programme.desc: Scientist Bruce Banner (Edward Norton) desperately seeks a cure for the gamma radiation that contaminated his cells and turned him into The Hulk. Cut off from his true love Betty Ross (Liv Tyler) and forced to hide from his nemesis, Gen. Thunderbolt Ross (William Hurt), Banner soon comes face-to-face with a new threat: a supremely powerful enemy known as The Abomination (Tim Roth).

programme.title: The Avengers
programme.desc: When Thor's evil brother, Loki (Tom Hiddleston), gains access to the unlimited power of the energy cube called the Tesseract, Nick Fury (Samuel L. Jackson), director of S.H.I.E.L.D., initiates a superhero recruitment effort to defeat the unprecedented threat to Earth. Joining Fury's "dream team" are Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.), Captain America (Chris Evans), the Hulk (Mark Ruffalo), Thor (Chris H

programme.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
programme.desc: When Tony Stark (Robert Downey Jr.) jump-starts a dormant peacekeeping program, things go terribly awry, forcing him, Thor (Chris Hemsworth), the Incredible Hulk (Mark Ruffalo) and the rest of the Avengers to reassemble. As the fate of Earth hangs in the balance, the team is put to the ultimate test as they battle Ultron, a technological terror hell-bent on human extinction. Along the way, they en

programme.title: Captain America: Civil War
programme.desc: Political pressure mounts to install a system of accountability when the actions of the Avengers lead to collateral damage. The new status quo deeply divides members of the team. Captain America (Chris Evans) believes superheroes should remain free to defend humanity without government interference. Iron Man (Robert Downey Jr.) sharply disagrees and supports oversight. As the debate escalates into

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
programme.desc: Convinced that mutants pose a threat to humanity, Dr. Bolivar Trask develops the Sentinels, enormous robotic weapons that can detect a mutant gene and zero in on that person. In the 21st century, the Sentinels have evolved into highly efficient killing machines. With mutants now facing extinction, Wolverine volunteers to go back in time and rally the X-Men of the past to help change a pivotal mome

programme.title: 2026 Silver Eagle Is Here... & It is a Once-In-A-Lifetime Coin!
programme.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programme.title: Inogen Portable Oxygen - No More Tanks!
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Evil wizard Gargamel (Hank Azaria) has plagued the happy, peaceful Smurfs for a very long time. Finally, he succeeds in chasing the little blue people from their village and through a magic portal -- which transports them to Manhattan and into the life of ad executive Patrick Winslow (Neil Patrick Harris). Only three apples high and lost in the Big Apple, the Smurfs (Jonathan Winters, Alan Cumming

programme.title: Ice Age: The Great Egg-Scapade
programme.desc: When two bunnies target Sid's booming egg-sitting business and hide his charges, Manny and Diego come to the rescue in a mission that becomes the first Easter egg hunt.

programme.title: Ice Age
programme.desc: Twenty-thousand years ago, Earth was a wondrous, prehistoric world filled with great danger, not the least of which is the beginning of the Ice Age. To avoid a terrible frostbite, the planet's majestic creatures - and a few small, slothful ones - begin migrating south. The story revolves around sub-zero heroes: a woolly mammoth, a saber-toothed tiger, a sloth and a prehistoric combination of a squ

programme.title: Ice Age: The Meltdown
programme.desc: With global warming threatening their once-icy domain with widespread flooding, Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) set out to find a safe haven. Along the way, another mammoth (Queen Latifah), who thinks she is an opossum, joins the travelers on their perilous quest.

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course
programme.desc: Manny the mammoth starts to worry when his daughter Peaches announces her engagement. Still unlucky in love, Sid the sloth volunteers to plan the couple's wedding. To Manny's dismay, nothing can stop the upcoming nuptials, except maybe the end of the world. When Scrat accidentally launches himself into outer space, he sets off a chain reaction that sends an asteroid hurtling toward Earth. Now, the

programme.title: Toy Story
programme.desc: Woody (Tom Hanks), a good-hearted cowboy doll who belongs to a young boy named Andy (John Morris), sees his position as Andy's favorite toy jeopardized when his parents buy him a Buzz Lightyear (Tim Allen) action figure. Even worse, the arrogant Buzz thinks he's a real spaceman on a mission to return to his home planet. When Andy's family moves to a new house, Woody and Buzz must escape the clutch

programme.title: Toy Story 2
programme.desc: Woody (Tom Hanks) is stolen from his home by toy dealer Al McWhiggin (Wayne Knight), leaving Buzz Lightyear (Tim Allen) and the rest of the gang to try to rescue him. But when Woody discovers that he's actually a valuable collectible from a once-popular television show called "Woody's Roundup" and is reunited with his horse Bullseye, Jessie the yodeling cowgirl (Joan Cusack) and his faithful sidek

programme.title: Toy Story 3
programme.desc: With their beloved Andy preparing to leave for college, Woody (Tom Hanks), Buzz Lightyear (Tim Allen), Jessie (Joan Cusack), and the rest of the toys find themselves headed for the attic but mistakenly wind up on the curb with the trash. Woody's quick thinking saves the gang, but all but Woody end up being donated to a day-care center. Unfortunately, the uncontrollable kids do not play nice, so Wo
